title: anthemis tricolor subsp. plutonia
intro: Anthemis tricolor subsp. plutonia, also known as Dog Fennel, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are utilized in traditional herbal medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
